## Question Type

- [ ] How-to question
- [ ] Technical question
- [ ] Configuration question
- [ ] API question
- [ ] Development question
- [ ] Deployment question
- [ ] Feature clarification
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Your Question

Please ask your question clearly and concisely.

## What You've Tried

Describe what you've already tried to solve your question:

1. [Step 1 you tried]
2. [Step 2 you tried]
3. [Step 3 you tried]

## Environment

- **OS**: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 13.0, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Node.js Version**: [e.g. 18.17.0]
- **Browser**: [e.g. Chrome 108, Firefox 107]
- **EduQuest Version**: [e.g. v1.2.3]

## Context

Provide any additional context that might help us answer your question:

- **Use Case**: [What are you trying to accomplish?]
- **Relevant Code**: [Include any relevant code snippets]
- **Error Messages**: [Include any error messages you're seeing]
- **Screenshots**: [If applicable, add screenshots]

## Related Resources

- **Documentation**: [Link to relevant documentation]
- **Issues**: [Related issue numbers]
- **Discussions**: [Related discussion links]

## Additional Context

Add any other context or information about your question here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched the existing issues and discussions
- [ ] I have read the relevant documentation
- [ ] I have provided enough context for my question
- [ ] I have specified my environment details
